sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n89410" key="prosqe/ths" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">προσ-θέτης</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ου</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, of a star, <sense id="n89410.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">accelerating,</tr_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Cat.Cod.Astr.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">7.119</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
